title.default: GigaPDF - Open Source, Collaborative PDF Editor

meta.description: Free open source PDF editor with real-time collaboration. Edit, annotate and merge PDFs easily. Intuitive WYSIWYG interface. Self-hostable under MIT license.
meta.keywords: free PDF editor, online PDF editor, edit PDF, annotate PDF, merge PDF, collaborative PDF, open source PDF, WYSIWYG PDF, professional PDF editing, free PDF tool, convert PDF, sign PDF, GigaPDF
meta.ogTitle: GigaPDF - Open Source Collaborative PDF Editor
meta.ogDescription: Edit your PDFs for free with GigaPDF. Real-time collaboration, annotations, document merging. 100% open source.
meta.twitterTitle: GigaPDF - The Open Source PDF Editor
meta.twitterDescription: Edit, annotate and collaborate on your PDFs in real-time. Free and open source.

hero.title: Professional PDF Editing
hero.description: Create, edit, and collaborate on PDF documents with our powerful WYSIWYG editor. Real-time collaboration, advanced features, and enterprise-grade security. 100% open source.

features.title: Everything you need to work with PDFs
features.description: Powerful features for individuals and teams, from simple edits to complex document workflows.

wysiwyg.title: WYSIWYG Editor
wysiwyg.description: Edit PDFs with a visual editor that shows exactly what you'll get. No more guessing how your document will look.

collaboration.title: Real-time Collaboration
collaboration.description: Work together with your team in real-time. See changes as they happen and collaborate seamlessly.

security.title: Enterprise Security
security.description: Your documents are encrypted and secure. SOC 2 compliant with enterprise-grade security features.

api.title: REST API
api.description: Full programmatic access to all features. Automate document workflows with our comprehensive API.

export.title: Multi-format Export
export.description: Export to PNG, JPEG, DOCX, HTML and more. OCR support for scanned documents with Tesseract.

selfHostable.title: Self-hostable
selfHostable.description: Deploy on your own infrastructure. Keep complete control over your documents and data.

pdfModification.title: PDF Modification
pdfModification.description: Add, update, or remove text, images, shapes, and annotations. Batch modify PDFs programmatically via API.

openSource.title: Built by the community, for the community
openSource.description: GigaPDF is 100% open source under the MIT license. Inspect the code, self-host, contribute features, or customize it to your needs.

mitLicense.title: MIT License
mitLicense.description: Use it however you want, commercially or personally. No strings attached.

selfHostable.title: Self-Hostable
selfHostable.description: Run GigaPDF on your own infrastructure with full control over your data.

contribute.title: Contribute
contribute.description: Join our community of contributors and help make GigaPDF even better.

documentation.title: Full Documentation
documentation.description: Comprehensive docs, API reference, and guides to get you started quickly.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.description: Start for free, upgrade when you need. No hidden fees, cancel anytime. Self-hosting is always free.
pricing.selfHostLink: Deploy GigaPDF on your own infrastructure
pricing.comingSoonNote: Paid plans are coming soon. In the meantime, enjoy the full editor on the free plan.

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.description: For large organizations with custom needs

finalCta.title: Ready to get started?
finalCta.description: Join thousands of users who trust GigaPDF for their PDF editing needs. Start for free today.

footer.tagline: Open source PDF editor for professionals. Built with love by the community.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.description: GigaPDF's mission is to democratize PDF editing by offering a professional, accessible, and fully open source tool. We believe everyone should have access to quality tools for managing their PDF documents.

openSource.title: Open Source
openSource.description: GigaPDF is a 100% open source project under the MIT license. This means you can inspect the source code, contribute to the project, or even host it yourself on your own infrastructure.

developer.title: Developer
developer.description: GigaPDF is developed and maintained by Rony Licha, a Full Stack developer with over 15 years of experience in web and mobile development.

hosting.title: Hosting
hosting.description: Our infrastructure is hosted at Scaleway, a European cloud provider ensuring the sovereignty of your data.

intro.title: Introduction
intro.description: At GigaPDF, we take the protection of your personal data very seriously. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information when you use our service.

usage.title: Usage data
usage.documents: PDF documents you upload and create

purpose.title: Purpose of processing
purpose.security: Ensure the security of your account
purpose.communication: Communicate with you about your account

contract.title: Contract performance
contract.description: To provide you with the requested services

legitimate.title: Legitimate interest
legitimate.description: To improve our services and ensure security

retention.title: Data retention
retention.description: We retain your data only for as long as necessary for the purposes for which it was collected.
retention.account: Account data: as long as your account is active
retention.documents: Documents: according to your retention settings

sharing.title: Data sharing
sharing.description: We never sell your personal data. We may share it only with:

rights.title: Your rights
rights.description: In accordance with GDPR, you have the following rights:

access.title: Right of access
access.description: Obtain a copy of your personal data

portability.title: Right to portability
portability.description: Receive your data in a structured format

restriction.title: Right to restriction
restriction.description: Restrict the processing of your data

rights.exercise: To exercise your rights, contact us at

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.description: We use essential cookies for the service to function.

essential.title: Essential cookies
essential.description: Necessary for the site to function (session, preferences)

security.title: Security
security.description: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your data.
security.encryption: Encryption of data in transit (HTTPS) and at rest
security.access: Limited access to data on a need-to-know basis
security.monitoring: Regular monitoring and auditing of our systems

openSource.title: Open Source and transparency
openSource.description: Since GigaPDF is open source, you can audit our code to verify how we process your data. The source code is available on GitHub.

changes.title: Changes to this policy
changes.description: We may update this policy from time to time. We will notify you of any significant changes by email or via a notification on the site.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: For any questions regarding this privacy policy, contact us:
contact.cnil: You can also file a complaint with the CNIL (French Data Protection Authority)

intro.title: Introduction
intro.description: Welcome to GigaPDF. These terms of service govern your access to and use of the GigaPDF service. By using our service, you agree to these terms.

definitions.title: Definitions
definitions.service: The GigaPDF platform, including the website and applications
definitions.content: Any document, text, image, or data uploaded to the Service
definitions.publisher: The publisher of the Service, Rony Licha

acceptance.title: Acceptance of terms
acceptance.description: By accessing or using GigaPDF, you agree to be bound by these terms. If you do not accept these terms, you must not use the service.

service.title: Service description
service.description: GigaPDF is a PDF document editing platform offering the following features:

account.title: User account
account.description: To use certain features, you must create an account. You are responsible for:

obligations.secure: Maintaining the confidentiality of your credentials
obligations.notify: Notifying us immediately of any unauthorized use
obligations.responsible: All activities performed under your account

usage.title: Acceptable use
usage.description: You agree to use the service responsibly and in accordance with applicable laws.

content.title: Content ownership
content.ownership: You retain all rights to the content you upload. GigaPDF does not claim any ownership rights to your content.
content.license: You grant us a limited license to process, store, and display your content solely for the purpose of providing the service.
content.responsibility: You are solely responsible for the content you upload and its compliance with applicable laws.

openSource.title: Open Source license
openSource.description: GigaPDF is open source software distributed under the MIT license.
openSource.license: You can use, copy, modify, and distribute the source code
openSource.source: The source code is available on GitHub
openSource.contributions: Contributions are welcome under the same license terms

pricing.title: Pricing and payment
pricing.description: GigaPDF offers free and paid plans.
pricing.free: The free plan includes basic features with limits
pricing.paid: Paid plans offer advanced features and higher limits
pricing.renewal: Subscriptions are automatically renewed unless cancelled
pricing.cancellation: You can cancel your subscription at any time

limitation.title: Limitation of liability
limitation.description: To the extent permitted by law, GigaPDF shall not be liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages.
limitation.availability: We do not guarantee 100% service availability
limitation.indirect: We are not responsible for data or revenue loss
limitation.force: We are not responsible for events beyond our control

warranty.title: Disclaimer of warranty
warranty.description: The service is provided "as is" without warranty of any kind, express or implied. We do not guarantee that the service will be error-free or uninterrupted.

termination.title: Termination
termination.byUser: You can terminate your account at any time from your settings.
termination.byUs: We may suspend or terminate your access in case of violation of these terms.
termination.effect: Upon termination, your data will be deleted in accordance with our privacy policy.

modifications.title: Modifications to terms
modifications.description: We may modify these terms at any time. Significant changes will be notified by email or on the site. Your continued use of the service after modification constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

law.title: Governing law
law.description: These terms are governed by French law.
law.jurisdiction: Any dispute shall be submitted to the competent courts of Paris, France.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: For any questions regarding these terms:

changelog.title: Changelog
changelog.description: All notable changes to GigaPDF are documented here. We follow semantic versioning.

subscribe.title: Stay Updated
subscribe.description: Follow our GitHub releases to get notified about new features and improvements.

docs.title: API Documentation
docs.description: Complete documentation for the GigaPDF REST API. Build powerful PDF workflows with our comprehensive endpoints.

swagger.description: Try out API endpoints directly in your browser with the interactive Swagger UI.

redoc.description: Clean, responsive documentation with detailed request/response schemas.

openapi.title: OpenAPI Specification
openapi.description: Download the OpenAPI 3.0 spec to generate clients in any language or import into Postman.

auth.title: Authentication
auth.description: All API requests require a JWT token in the Authorization header.

example.title: Example Request
example.description: Upload a PDF document to start editing.

features.title: API Features
features.pages: Page operations: add, remove, reorder, rotate
features.export: Export to PNG, JPEG, DOCX, HTML
features.ocr: OCR text extraction from scanned PDFs

embedSdk.title: Embed SDK
embedSdk.description: Embed the GigaPDF editor into any website with just a few lines of code. Available in Vanilla JS, React, and via CDN.

embed.title: Embed SDK
embed.description: Embed the GigaPDF PDF editor directly into your website or application. Your users can edit PDFs without leaving your platform.

step1.title: Create an API key
step1.description: Generate an API key from your GigaPDF dashboard. Configure allowed domains to secure access.

step2.title: Add the SDK
step2.description: Install the npm package or include the CDN script in your page. Initialize the editor with your API key.

step3.title: Embedded editor
step3.description: The PDF editor renders in a secure iframe. Communicate via postMessage to save, export, and more.

npm.description: Install the package from the npm registry to use in your JavaScript/TypeScript project.

cdn.description: Include the script directly in your HTML page. No build step required.

cdn.title: CDN Script (plain HTML)
cdn.description: The fastest method. Add the script and initialize the editor in a few lines.

esm.title: Vanilla JS / ES Modules
esm.description: For projects with a bundler (Vite, Webpack, etc.). Direct import with TypeScript support.

react.title: React Component
react.description: React component with ref to control the editor programmatically. Compatible with React 18+.

descriptions.apiKey: Your GigaPDF API key (starts with giga_pk_)
descriptions.container: Target HTML element or CSS selector (Vanilla JS only)
descriptions.documentId: Document ID to load. Opens an empty editor if omitted
descriptions.baseUrl: URL of your GigaPDF instance (self-hosted or staging)
descriptions.tools: Restrict available tools: text, image, shape, annotation, form, signature

descriptions.ready: The editor is loaded and ready to use

descriptions.loadDocument: Load a different document by ID
descriptions.destroy: Remove the iframe and clean up all listeners

apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.description: API keys are created from your dashboard or via the REST API. Each key is SHA-256 hashed server-side — the plaintext key is only visible at creation time.
apiKeys.createExample: Create an API key with allowed domains

domains.title: Domain Restriction
domains.description: Configure allowed domains when creating your API key. The iframe will only work from these domains, preventing unauthorized use of your key.

scopes.title: Scopes and Permissions
scopes.description: Limit each API key's permissions with scopes: read-only, edit, export, etc. The principle of least privilege applies.

selfHosted.title: Self-Hosting
selfHosted.description: If you are using a self-hosted GigaPDF instance, specify your instance URL via the baseUrl option:

cta.title: Ready to integrate?
cta.description: Create a free account to get your API key and start embedding the PDF editor in your site.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.subtitle: Have a question, suggestion, or need help? Don't hesitate to contact us.

success.title: Message sent!
success.description: Thank you for your message. We will get back to you as soon as possible.

developers.title: API Keys
developers.description: Manage your API keys to integrate the PDF editor into your applications

noKeys.title: No API keys
noKeys.description: Create your first API key to start integrating the PDF editor.

createDialog.title: Create an API key
createDialog.name: Key name
createDialog.domainsHelp: Separate domains with commas. Leave empty to allow all domains.

createSuccess.title: API key created
createSuccess.description: Copy your keys now. The secret key will not be shown again after closing this window.
createSuccess.warning: Save the secret key in a safe place. It will not be displayed again.

regenerateDialog.title: Regenerate key
regenerateDialog.publishableDescription: The current publishable key will be immediately invalidated. All widgets using this key will stop working.
regenerateDialog.secretDescription: The current secret key will be immediately invalidated. All API calls using this key will fail.
regenerateDialog.success: New key generated. Copy it now, it will not be shown again.

deleteDialog.title: Delete API key
deleteDialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete the key "{name}"? This action is irreversible and all services using this key will stop working.

dialog.title: Share document
dialog.description: Share this document with others via email

currentShares.title: People with access
currentShares.noShares: This document is not shared with anyone

publicLink.title: Public link
publicLink.description: Anyone with the link can view this document
